mapper.sql: ca.id, ca.record_id, ca.question_id, ca.type_id, ca.candidate_answer, ca.correct_answer, ca.score, ca.get_score, ca.is_correct, ca.comment, ca.create_time, ca.update_time, qt.name as type_name, q.title, q.option_a, q.option_b, q.option_c, q.option_d
mapper.select: select from candidate_answer ca left join question_type qt on ca.type_id = qt.id left join question q on ca.question_id = q.id where ca.id = #{id}
select from candidate_answer ca left join question_type qt on ca.type_id = qt.id left join question q on ca.question_id = q.id where ca.record_id = #{recordId} order by ca.id asc
mapper.insert: insert into candidate_answer(record_id, question_id, type_id, candidate_answer, correct_answer, score, get_score, is_correct, comment) values(#{recordId}, #{questionId}, #{typeId}, #{candidateAnswer}, #{correctAnswer}, #{score}, #{getScore}, #{isCorrect}, #{comment})

insert into candidate_answer(record_id, question_id, type_id, candidate_answer, correct_answer, score, get_score, is_correct, comment) values
(#{item.recordId}, #{item.questionId}, #{item.typeId}, #{item.candidateAnswer}, #{item.correctAnswer}, #{item.score}, #{item.getScore}, #{item.isCorrect}, #{item.comment})
